headline: Discount Retailer Stocks Q4 Teardown: TJX (NYSE:TJX) Vs The Rest
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how TJX (NYSE:TJX) and the rest of the discount retailer stocks fared in Q4.
